name: MINISTOP Co., Ltd.
summary: MINISTOP Co., Ltd. develops and franchises a chain of convenience stores under the MINISTOP name. The company also engages in the food manufacturing and supply business. As of October 31, 2020, it operated 5,304 stores, including 1,999 stores in Japan and 3,305 stores internationally. MINISTOP Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan.
